_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Retinal Laser Photocoagulation (For retinal tear repair Per Eye Per Sitting)
source_files: PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Retinal laser photocoagulation/Retinal laser photocoagulation_Medco.pdf
PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Retinal laser photocoagulation/Retinal laser photocoagulation_PPD.CPD.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: MD/MS/ DNB/ PG Diploma/ equivalent (in Ophthalmology)

claim.label: Intra-Procedure photograph with time and date (optional)

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes including history (of diabetes/ trauma), family history, clinical symptoms (floaters, vision loss), examination (fundus examination using direct/ indirect ophthalmoscope &B-scan)?
Clinical photo of Affected part with Proper labelling of Affected Eye whether R or L with full face photograph.
Did the patient history, symptoms (dark spots/ floaters in the vision) and clinical examination correlate with the findings suggesting the need for retinal laser photocoagulation?

cpd_claim.q: Do OT/procedure notes detail the steps performed and was the intervention successful?
Are the documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advise including for follow-up?
Was the intra procedure photograph submitted?

common_queries: Patient history, symptoms, or clinical examination findings do not correlate with the need for retinal laser photocoagulation.
Detailed clinical notes missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Clinical photo of affected part missing or improperly labelled (R or L) or full face photograph missing at pre-authorization.
Admission notes missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
OT/procedure notes missing or do not detail steps performed or intervention success at claim submission.
Documents for post-op care and follow-up advice missing at claim submission.
Intra-procedure photograph not submitted at claim submission (if applicable for non-optional cases or for optional if submitted).

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Laser treatment only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, ophthalmic examination.
Loss of vision (painless in case of diabetic retinopathy), dark painless floaters
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Fundus examination (Direct/ Indirect ophthalmoscope), slit lamp examination, B-scan ultrasound
